title: tylanthus atratus
intro: Tylanthus atratus, also known as Black Sage, is a flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Black Sage include reduced stress levels, improved digestion, and relief from respiratory issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Black Sage include tea infusions, essential oils, and dried leaves, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
